summary: The client entrypoint now emits real JavaScript string literals for runtime config values, including backslashes and newlines.

targeted_proof.command: npm run test:summary:client -- --file client/src/test/clientEntrypoint.test.ts --test-name "client entrypoint emits executable runtime config for env values with backslashes and newlines"
targeted_proof.notes: Targeted client wrapper ran the shell entrypoint against a temp config path and proved the emitted config.js stays executable and preserves backslash and newline env values.
